title: heracleum sphondylium subsp. aurasiacum
intro: Heracleum sphondylium subsp. aurasiacum is a subspecies of wild angelica, a biennial plant native to southern Europe, characterized by its tall stature and umbrella-like inflorescence. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Heracleum sphondylium subsp. aurasiacum include relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and allergenicity.
